name: story-writer
author: bobchao
description: Converts RFP analysis results or functional requirements into high-quality, executable User Stories. Follows INVEST principles, produces complete Stories with acceptance criteria, and organizes output by functional modules.

name: anthropic-sdk
author: bobmatnyc
description: Official Anthropic SDK for Claude AI with chat, streaming, function calling, and vision capabilities

name: cloudflare-workers-edge-ai-development
author: bobmatnyc
description: Build ultra-low-latency edge computing applications with Cloudflare Workers, Workers AI for LLM inference, V8 isolates, Durable Objects, and serverless patterns deployed across 330+ data centers worldwide

name: fastapi-modern-web-development
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade FastAPI development with async patterns, Pydantic v2, dependency injection, ML/AI endpoint design, and modern Python best practices for building high-performance REST APIs

name: langgraph
author: bobmatnyc
description: LangGraph framework for building stateful, multi-agent AI applications with cyclical workflows, human-in-the-loop patterns, and persistent checkpointing.

name: observability-with-prometheus-grafana
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade observability stack with Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, PromQL query language, alerting rules, and AI-powered anomaly detection for modern cloud-native applications

name: postgresql-performance-optimization
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade PostgreSQL query optimization, indexing strategies, performance tuning, and modern features including pgvector for AI/ML workloads. Master EXPLAIN plans, query analysis, and database design for high-performance applications

name: security-vulnerability-testing
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade security testing with agentic vulnerability detection, SAST/DAST tools, OWASP Top 10 coverage, threat modeling, and AI-powered security analysis achieving 92% detection accuracy (OpenAI Aardvark benchmark 2024)

name: terraform-infrastructure-as-code
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade Terraform development with HCL best practices, module design, state management, multi-cloud patterns, and AI-enhanced infrastructure as code for scalable cloud deployments

name: web3-blockchain-development
author: bobmatnyc
description: Production-grade Web3 development with Solidity smart contracts, ethers.js/web3.js integration, DApp architecture, security patterns, and AI-enhanced blockchain development (ChatWeb3, Aider + Gemini 2024)

name: agent-integrator
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to create or update the root AGENTS.md file to register AgenticDev skills for AI agent discovery. Triggers include "register AgenticDev", "update AGENTS.md", "setup agent guide", or initializing a new project.

name: change-integrator
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill after a code PR is merged to integrate approved specs, update the retrospective with learnings, and clean up branches. It now automatically summarizes the retrospective file to keep it concise. Triggers include "integrate change", "post-merge cleanup", or completing a feature implementation.

name: doc-indexer
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill at the beginning of any session or when needing to understand available project documentation. Provides just-in-time context by scanning YAML frontmatter from all markdown files in the docs/ directory without loading full content.

name: doc-validator
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to validate that Markdown files are in standard locations. Scans for .md files outside of predefined allowed directories and outputs warnings to prevent documentation sprawl. Triggers include "validate docs", "check markdown locations", or as part of quality checks.

name: issue-executor
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to start work on a GitHub issue. It synthesizes all relevant context (specs, retrospective, issue details) using the Gemini CLI to generate a step-by-step implementation plan, then creates a feature branch to begin work. Triggers include "start work on issue

name: prd-authoring
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill for early-stage project planning. It leverages the Gemini CLI to generate high-quality first drafts of Product Briefs, Research Documents, and full PRDs, guiding users from idea to validated requirements. Triggers include "create PRD", "product brief", or "validate requirements".

name: project-init
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill when starting a new project or adding AgenticDev to an existing project. Scaffolds the directory structure (docs/specs, docs/changes) and configuration files needed for the spec-driven development workflow.

name: project-migrate
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to migrate existing projects to the AgenticDev structure. It uses an AI-powered analysis to intelligently discover, categorize, and migrate documentation, generate rich frontmatter, and preserve git history.

name: skill-lister
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to discover all available AgenticDev skills and their capabilities. Provides a bootstrap context for AI agents by listing all skills, their descriptions, and script paths from the .claude/skills/ directory.

name: spec-authoring
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to propose changes via the Spec PR process. It uses the Gemini CLI to generate high-quality draft specifications and to analyze PR feedback, accelerating the spec-driven development workflow. Triggers include "create spec" or "propose change".

name: sprint-planner
author: bodangren
description: Use this skill to plan a new sprint. It uses the Gemini CLI to intelligently decompose approved specs into atomic GitHub issues for the development team. Triggers include "plan sprint", "create sprint", or "start new sprint".

name: bsl-model-builder
author: boringdata
description: Build BSL semantic models with dimensions, measures, joins, and YAML config. Use for creating/modifying data models.
description_zh: 该技能用于使用Boring Semantic Layer (BSL)构建语义数据模型。它基于Ibis表定义维度和度量，支持表连接，并可通过YAML文件进行配置。适用于创建可重用的分析数据模型。
_original_description: This skill helps build semantic data models using the Boring Semantic Layer (BSL). It defines dimensions and measures on Ibis tables, supports joins, and allows configuration via YAML. It's designed for creating reusable data models for analytics.

name: bsl-query-expert
author: boringdata
description: Query BSL semantic models with group_by, aggregate, filter, and visualizations. Use for data analysis from existing semantic tables.
description_zh: 用于查询BSL语义模型的Claude技能，支持分组、聚合、筛选操作和自动可视化。为分析现有语义表提供详细的查询模式、错误处理和数据发现工作流指导。
_original_description: A Claude Skill for querying BSL semantic models with group_by, aggregate, filter operations and automatic visualizations. It provides detailed guidance on query patterns, error handling, and data discovery workflows for analyzing existing semantic tables.

name: analyze-project
author: brobertsaz
description: Analyze a project's codebase and documentation to generate coding standards, architecture docs, and development practices. Perfect for new project onboarding. Usage: 'analyze-project: /path/to/project' or 'analyze: /path/to/project'
description_zh: 强大的项目分析技能，自动生成全面的编码标准、架构和开发实践文档，显著加速项目上手和AI辅助开发。
_original_description: A powerful project analysis skill that automatically generates comprehensive documentation for coding standards, architecture, and development practices, significantly accelerating project onboarding and AI-assisted development.

name: memory
author: brobertsaz
description: Save and recall information across sessions. Use when you hear 'remember this', 'save to memory', 'add to your knowledge', or similar. Stores to Claude OS knowledge bases for persistent recall.
description_zh: 将用户提供的信息保存到Claude OS知识库中，供未来会话调用。使用'记住这个'等触发短语存储带标题、分类和要点的结构化笔记。自动分类内容并简要确认保存。
_original_description: Saves user-provided information to Claude OS knowledge bases for recall in future sessions. Uses trigger phrases like 'remember this' to store structured notes with titles, categories, and key points. Automatically categorizes content and confirms saves briefly.

name: test-driven-development
author: brobertsaz
description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code - write the test first, watch it fail, write minimal code to pass; ensures tests actually verify behavior by requiring failure first
description_zh: 该技能为Claude强制执行严格的测试驱动开发（TDD）纪律。它要求在编写任何生产代码之前必须先编写失败的测试，提供了好/坏测试的具体示例，并包含验证清单。旨在防止常见的跳过TDD的借口。
_original_description: This skill enforces strict Test-Driven Development (TDD) discipline for Claude. It mandates writing a failing test before any production code, provides concrete examples of good/bad tests, and includes a verification checklist. It's designed to prevent common rationalizations for skipping TDD.

name: agent-coordination
author: bybren-llc
description: Agent assignment matrix, blocker escalation, and TDM coordination patterns. Use when assigning work to specialists, managing blockers, or coordinating multi-agent workflows.
description_zh: 为专业智能体分配任务、管理阻塞问题和协调多智能体工作流提供结构化指导。包含清晰的升级协议、实施前检查点和用于Linear工单的证据附件模板。
_original_description: Provides structured guidance for assigning tasks to specialized agents, managing blockers, and coordinating multi-agent workflows. Includes clear escalation protocols, pre-implementation gates, and evidence attachment templates for Linear tickets.

name: api-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: API route implementation patterns with RLS, Zod validation, and error handling. Use when creating API routes, implementing endpoints, or adding server-side validation.
description_zh: 提供构建安全API路由的具体模式，包含RLS、Zod验证和结构化错误处理。包含禁止/正确的代码示例、检查清单、响应模板和权威参考链接。专注于防止Next.js应用中的常见安全漏洞。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for building secure API routes with RLS, Zod validation, and structured error handling. Includes forbidden/correct code examples, checklists, response templates, and links to authoritative references. Focuses on preventing common security pitfalls in Next.js applications.

name: confluence-docs
author: bybren-llc
description: Documentation templates for ADRs, runbooks, and architecture docs. Use when creating architectural decision records, operational runbooks, or technical documentation.
description_zh: 提供用于架构决策记录、操作手册、架构文档和知识转移文档的结构化Markdown模板。包含清晰的命名规范和发布前检查清单，适合需要统一技术文档格式的团队使用。
_original_description: Provides structured Markdown templates for ADRs, runbooks, architecture docs, and KT documents. Includes clear file naming conventions and a pre-publish checklist. Useful for teams needing consistent technical documentation formats.

name: deployment-sop
author: bybren-llc
description: Deployment workflows, pre-deploy validation, and smoke testing patterns. Use when deploying to staging or production, running smoke tests, or validating deployments.
description_zh: 提供结构化的部署工作流，包含部署前后检查清单、冒烟测试模式和回滚流程。链接到权威的SOP文档而非复制内容。包含具体的验证命令和用于跟踪的部署证据模板。
_original_description: Provides structured deployment workflows with pre/post-deployment checklists, smoke test patterns, and rollback procedures. Links to authoritative SOP documents rather than duplicating content. Includes concrete commands for validation and evidence templates for tracking.

name: frontend-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Frontend patterns for Next.js App Router, Clerk auth, shadcn/Radix UI, and PostHog analytics. Use when building UI components, creating pages, implementing auth flows, or adding analytics events. Ensures consistent UX patterns and accessibility standards.
description_zh: 提供使用 Next.js App Router、Clerk 身份验证、shadcn/ui 组件和 PostHog 分析构建前端的明确模式。包含服务器/客户端组件、受保护路由、表单验证和事件跟踪的清晰示例。提供无障碍访问和响应式设计检查清单。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for building frontends with Next.js App Router, Clerk authentication, shadcn/ui components, and PostHog analytics. Includes clear examples for server/client components, protected routes, form validation, and event tracking. Offers accessibility and responsive design checklists.

name: git-advanced
author: bybren-llc
description: Advanced git operations including rebase, bisect, cherry-pick, and conflict resolution. Use when rebasing branches, debugging with bisect, cherry-picking commits, or resolving complex merge conflicts.
description_zh: 该技能提供高级Git操作的详细指导，包括变基、二分查找、拣选提交和冲突解决。它强调安全性，明确列出禁止操作，提供恢复命令，并为PR准备和错误排查等常见场景提供实用工作流程。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for advanced Git operations including rebasing, bisecting, cherry-picking, and conflict resolution. It emphasizes safety with clear forbidden operations, recovery commands, and practical workflows for common scenarios like PR preparation and bug hunting.

name: linear-sop
author: bybren-llc
description: Linear ticket management best practices. Use when creating issues, updating status, or attaching evidence. Provides evidence templates for dev/staging/done phases.
description_zh: 该技能为Linear工单管理提供标准化模板和流程，强制要求开发各阶段提供证据。包含创建、更新工单的具体示例，以及开发、测试、完成阶段的证据模板。
_original_description: This skill provides standardized templates and procedures for managing Linear tickets, focusing on mandatory evidence collection during development phases. It includes concrete examples for creating, updating, and commenting on issues with specific evidence templates for dev, staging, and done phases.

name: migration-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Database migration creation with mandatory RLS policies and ARCHitect approval workflow. Use when creating migrations, adding tables with RLS, or updating Prisma schema.
description_zh: 强制实施安全优先的数据库迁移，要求RLS策略与表创建在同一文件中。提供明确的禁止/正确模式、强制审批流程和生产部署保障。专注于防止Prisma PostgreSQL项目中常见的安全疏忽。
_original_description: Enforces security-first database migrations by requiring RLS policies in the same file as table creation. Provides clear forbidden/correct patterns, mandatory approval workflows, and production deployment safeguards. Focuses on preventing common security oversights in Prisma-based PostgreSQL projects.

name: orchestration-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Agentic orchestration patterns for long-running tasks. Implements evidence-based delivery and Simon Willison's agent loop. Use when managing multi-step work, coordinating subagents, or orchestrating PR workflows.

name: pattern-discovery
author: bybren-llc
description: Pattern library discovery for pattern-first development. Use BEFORE implementing any new feature, creating components, writing API routes, or adding database operations. Ensures existing patterns are checked first before writing new code.
description_zh: 该技能强制执行模式优先开发，要求开发者在编写新代码前检查文档化的模式库。它提供清晰的搜索路径、模式匹配表和验证步骤，以减少重复代码并确保API路由、UI组件、数据库操作和测试的一致性。
_original_description: This skill enforces pattern-first development by requiring developers to check a documented pattern library before writing new code. It provides clear search paths, pattern matching tables, and validation steps to reduce duplication and maintain consistency across API routes, UI components, database operations, and tests.

name: release-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: PR creation, CI/CD validation, and release coordination patterns. Use when creating pull requests, running pre-PR validation, checking CI status, or coordinating merges.
description_zh: 该技能强制执行基于rebase的Git工作流，要求在创建PR前进行CI验证。提供正确和禁止模式的命令示例，确保线性提交历史和工单引用。包含PR前检查清单和QAS审核要求，适用于团队协作环境。
_original_description: This skill enforces a rebase-first Git workflow with mandatory CI validation before PR creation. It provides concrete command examples for correct and forbidden patterns, ensuring linear history and ticket references in commits. The skill includes pre-PR checklists and QAS gate requirements for team consistency.

name: rls-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Row Level Security patterns for database operations. Use when writing Prisma/database code, creating API routes that access data, or implementing webhooks. Enforces withUserContext, withAdminContext, or withSystemContext helpers. NEVER use direct prisma calls.
description_zh: 为Prisma数据库操作提供行级安全模式实现方案。通过上下文包装器强制数据隔离，区分用户、管理员和系统操作场景。包含明确代码示例、禁止模式说明，以及Next.js动态渲染要求和测试方法的具体指导。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for implementing Row Level Security with Prisma using context wrappers. Enforces data isolation between users, admins, and system processes with clear code examples and forbidden patterns. Includes specific guidance for Next.js dynamic rendering requirements and testing procedures.

name: safe-workflow
author: bybren-llc
description: SAFe development workflow guidance including branch naming conventions, commit message format, rebase-first workflow, and CI validation. Use when starting work on a Linear ticket, preparing commits, creating branches, writing PR descriptions, or asking about contribution guidelines.
description_zh: 提供SAFe开发工作流的结构化指导，包括分支命名、提交格式、变基优先工作流和PR前验证。帮助团队在多贡献者环境中保持一致的Git历史和工单可追溯性。
_original_description: Provides structured guidance for SAFe development workflows including branch naming, commit formatting, rebase-first practices, and pre-PR validation. Helps teams maintain consistent git history and ticket traceability across multiple contributors.

name: security-audit
author: bybren-llc
description: RLS validation, security audits, OWASP compliance, and vulnerability scanning. Use when validating RLS policies, auditing API routes, or scanning for security issues.
description_zh: 该技能为RLS策略、API认证和漏洞检测提供具体的安全审计指导。包含明确的禁止模式、正确示例以及可操作的检查清单，附带grep命令用于实际安全验证。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete security audit guidance for RLS policies, API authentication, and vulnerability detection. It includes specific forbidden patterns, correct examples, and actionable checklists with grep commands for real-world security validation.

name: spec-creation
author: bybren-llc
description: Spec creation with pattern references, acceptance criteria, and demo scripts. Use when creating implementation specs, defining acceptance criteria, or breaking down user stories.
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者创建包含可测试验收标准、模式参考和验证命令的详细实现规范。它强制执行结构化模板以防止不完整的规范，并确保规范可供执行代理使用。
_original_description: This skill helps developers create detailed implementation specs with testable acceptance criteria, pattern references, and validation commands. It enforces a structured template to prevent incomplete specifications and ensures specs are ready for execution agents.

name: stripe-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Stripe payment integration patterns. Use when implementing payment flows, handling webhooks, or working with subscriptions. Routes to existing patterns and provides evidence templates for payment testing.
description_zh: 提供 Stripe 支付集成的具体模式，包括结账会话、Webhook 处理和订阅管理。包含安全检查清单、幂等性模式和测试证据模板，重点防止使用生产密钥和遗漏签名验证等常见错误。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for integrating Stripe payments, including checkout sessions, webhook handling, and subscription management. Includes safety checklists, idempotency patterns, and evidence templates for testing. Focuses on preventing common mistakes like using production keys and missing signature verification.

name: testing-patterns
author: bybren-llc
description: Testing patterns for Jest and Playwright. Use when writing tests, setting up test fixtures, or validating RLS enforcement. Routes to existing test conventions and provides evidence templates.
description_zh: 提供 Jest 和 Playwright 的具体测试模式，包含 RLS 感知的测试设置。包含目录结构、配置示例和 Linear 证据模板。专注于测试隔离和上下文助手等实际实现细节。
_original_description: Provides concrete testing patterns for Jest and Playwright with RLS-aware test setup. Includes directory structure, configuration examples, and evidence templates for Linear. Focuses on practical implementation details like test isolation and context helpers.

name: material-component-doc
author: bytedance
description: 用于 FlowGram 物料库组件文档撰写的专用技能，提供组件文档生成、Story 创建、翻译等功能的指导和自动化支持
description_zh: 该技能为FlowGram框架内的组件物料库提供了一套结构化的文档撰写流程。它指导用户从源码分析、创建Story组件、编写MDX文档到处理翻译，并强制执行项目特定的命名规范、代码模式和检查清单。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for generating component documentation within the FlowGram framework. It guides users from source code analysis to creating Story components, writing MDX docs, and handling translations. It enforces naming conventions, code patterns, and quality checks specific to the project's architecture.

name: github
author: callstackincubator
description: GitHub patterns using gh CLI for pull requests, stacked PRs, code review, branching strategies, and repository automation. Use when working with GitHub PRs, merging strategies, or repository management tasks.
_original_description: GitHub patterns for PRs, code review, branching, and repository management. Use when working with pull requests, stacked PRs, code reviews, GitHub or repository automation.

name: react-native-best-practices
author: callstackincubator
description: Provides React Native performance optimization guidelines for FPS, TTI, bundle size, memory leaks, re-renders, and animations. Applies to tasks involving Hermes optimization, JS thread blocking, bridge overhead, FlashList, native modules, or debugging jank and frame drops.

name: validate-skills
author: callstackincubator
description: Validates skills in this repo against agentskills.io spec and Claude Code best practices. Use via /validate-skills command.

name: flutter-dev
author: calvingit
description: Expert guidance for Flutter and Dart development. Use when building Flutter apps, implementing state management, setting up routing, writing tests, or working with Flutter UI components. Provides access to detailed rules for Bloc, Riverpod, Provider, Mocktail, and more.

name: flutter-firebase
author: calvingit
description: Expert guidance for Firebase integration in Flutter apps. Use when setting up Firebase, implementing authentication, using Cloud Firestore, Cloud Storage, Cloud Functions, FCM push notifications, Analytics, or any other Firebase services. Provides access to detailed rules for all major Firebase Flutter plugins.

name: swift-concurrency
author: calvingit
description: Expert guidance on Swift Concurrency concepts. Use when working with async/await, Tasks, actors, MainActor, Sendable, isolation domains, or debugging concurrency compiler errors. Helps write safe concurrent Swift code.

name: brand-content-design
author: camoa
description: Use when user says "create presentation", "make carousel", "create HTML page", "make landing page", "build web page", "html design system", "design system", "setup brand", "brand init", "extract brand", "get outline", or wants to create visual content with consistent branding. Creates branded presentations, carousels, and HTML pages using a layered philosophy system.
_original_description: Use when user says "create presentation", "make carousel", "setup brand", "brand init", "extract brand", "get outline", or wants to create visual content with consistent branding. Creates branded presentations and carousels using a layered philosophy system.

name: code-helper
author: camoa
description: Assists with code quality tasks. Use when reviewing code, checking for issues, or improving code quality.

name: code-pattern-checker
author: camoa
description: Use before committing code - validates Drupal coding standards, SOLID/DRY principles, security practices, and CSS standards

name: code-quality-audit
author: camoa
description: Use when checking code quality, running security audits, testing coverage, finding violations, or setting up quality tools - supports Drupal (PHPStan, PHPMD, PHPCPD, Psalm, Semgrep, Trivy, Gitleaks via DDEV) and Next.js (ESLint, Jest, jscpd, madge, Semgrep, Trivy, Gitleaks) projects with TDD, SOLID, DRY, and OWASP security checks
_original_description: Use when auditing code quality, security vulnerabilities, checking coverage, finding SOLID/DRY violations, running TDD - supports both Drupal (PHPStan, PHPMD, PHPCPD, Psalm, Semgrep, Trivy, Gitleaks via DDEV) and Next.js (ESLint, Jest, jscpd, madge, Semgrep, Trivy, Gitleaks) projects

name: component-designer
author: camoa
description: Use when designing a specific module component - creates architecture/component_name.md with purpose, interface, dependencies, and pattern references

name: core-pattern-finder
author: camoa
description: Use when needing Drupal core implementation examples - searches core modules for specific patterns and returns file path references

name: diagram-generator
author: camoa
description: Use when visualizing architecture - generates Mermaid diagrams for data flow, service relationships, or entity structures

name: generating-infographics
author: camoa
description: Use when creating infographics, data visualizations, process diagrams, timelines, or comparisons - generates branded infographics using @antv/infographic with 114 templates across 7 categories. Triggers on "create infographic", "make infographic", "visualize data", "timeline", "process diagram".

name: greeter
author: camoa
description: Greets users warmly. Use when user says hello, hi, good morning, or wants a friendly greeting.

name: guide-integrator
author: camoa
description: Use when designing features - loads plugin methodology refs, fetches online dev-guides for Drupal domain knowledge, and optionally loads user's custom guides
_original_description: Use when designing features - loads plugin references and optionally user's custom guides based on keywords

name: guide-loader
author: camoa
description: Use when needing specialized guide content - loads from user's configured path or fetches from online dev-guides based on task keywords
_original_description: Use when needing specialized guide content - loads guides from configured path based on current task

name: htmx-development
author: camoa
description: Use when developing HTMX features in Drupal 11.3+ or migrating AJAX to HTMX. Covers Htmx class usage, form patterns, migration strategies, and validation. Triggers on "htmx", "ajax to htmx", "dynamic form", "dependent dropdown".

name: implementation-task-creator
author: camoa
description: Use when breaking down a component for implementation - creates task file in implementation_process/in_progress/ with TDD steps and acceptance criteria

name: memory-manager
author: camoa
description: Use after completing any phase activity - updates project_state.md, project registry, ensures files are in correct locations, maintains lean memory

name: paper-test
author: camoa
description: Use when testing code through mental execution - trace code line-by-line with concrete input values to find bugs, logic errors, missing code, edge cases, and contract violations before deployment

name: phase-detector
author: camoa
description: Use when determining task phase - analyzes task file to identify Phase 1, 2, or 3 for a specific task

name: plugin-creation
author: camoa
description: Use when creating Claude Code plugins - covers skills, commands, agents, hooks, MCP servers, and plugin configuration. Use when user says "create plugin", "make a skill", "add command", "add hooks", etc.

name: project-initializer
author: camoa
description: Use when starting a new development project - creates memory folder structure with project_state.md, architecture scaffolding, and registers project

name: requirements-gatherer
author: camoa
description: Use when gathering project requirements - asks structured questions about project type, scope, integrations, and constraints to populate project_state.md

name: session-resume
author: camoa
description: Use when resuming work on existing project - lists registered projects, reads project_state.md, summarizes current state, identifies where to continue

name: task-completer
author: camoa
description: Use when finishing a task - moves task to completed/, updates project_state.md, suggests next task

name: task-context-loader
author: camoa
description: Use when starting implementation of a task - loads architecture files, referenced patterns, relevant guides, and task file into context

name: task-folder-migrator
author: camoa
description: Use when migrating existing single-file tasks to folder-based structure - preserves content, creates organized folders, backs up originals

name: tdd-companion
author: camoa
description: Use during implementation to enforce TDD - reminds test-first, validates Red-Green-Refactor cycle, integrates with superpowers:test-driven-development

name: visual-content
author: camoa
description: Use when creating branded presentations or carousels. Generates museum-quality visual output from canvas philosophy, enforcing style constraints. Outputs PDF first, then converts to PPTX for editability.

name: bad--name
author: can1357
description: A skill with consecutive hyphens in the name.

name: calendar
author: can1357
description: Second calendar skill.

name: child-skill
author: can1357
description: A nested skill in a subdirectory.

name: different-name
author: can1357
description: A skill with a name that doesn't match the directory.

name: invalid-name
author: can1357
description: A skill with invalid characters in the name.

name: semantic-compression
author: can1357
description: Aggressively remove grammatical scaffolding LLMs reconstruct while preserving meaning-carrying content. Output may be fragments. Use when compressing text for prompts, reducing token count, preparing context for LLM input, or making documentation more token-efficient. Applies LLM-aware compression rules that delete predictable grammar while preserving semantics.

name: system-prompts
author: can1357
description: Write system prompts, tool docs, and agent definitions. Combines research-backed prompt engineering (+15-30% measured improvements) with project XML conventions. Covers tag hierarchy, structural templates, high-impact interventions, anti-patterns.

name: this-is-a-very-long-skill-name-that-exceeds-the-sixty-four-character-limit-set-by-the-standard
author: can1357
description: A skill with a name that exceeds 64 characters.

name: unknown-field
author: can1357
description: A skill with an unknown frontmatter field.

name: valid-skill
author: can1357
description: A valid skill for testing purposes.

name: capacitor-accessibility
author: cap-go
description: Accessibility guide for Capacitor apps covering screen readers, semantic HTML, focus management, and WCAG compliance. Use this skill when users need to make their app accessible.
description_zh: 一个全面的指南，用于在 Capacitor 应用中实现无障碍功能，涵盖屏幕阅读器、语义化 HTML、焦点管理、WCAG 合规性以及测试，旨在创建包容性的移动和 Web 应用。

name: capacitor-app-store
author: cap-go
description: Complete guide to publishing Capacitor apps to Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Covers app preparation, screenshots, metadata, review guidelines, and submission process. Use this skill when users are ready to publish their app.
description_zh: 一个完整的指南，用于将Capacitor应用发布到苹果App Store和Google Play商店，涵盖两个平台的准备、配置、提交和审核指南。

name: capacitor-best-practices
author: cap-go
description: Best practices for Capacitor app development including project structure, plugin usage, performance optimization, security, and deployment. Use this skill when reviewing Capacitor code, setting up new projects, or optimizing existing apps.
description_zh: 提供全面的Capacitor应用开发最佳实践，包括项目结构、插件使用、性能优化、安全性和部署指南，用于构建生产就绪的移动应用程序。

name: capacitor-ci-cd
author: cap-go
description: Complete CI/CD guide for Capacitor apps covering GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, build automation, app signing, and deployment pipelines. Use this skill when users need to automate their build and release process.
description_zh: 一个完整的Capacitor应用CI/CD自动化指南，涵盖GitHub Actions工作流、构建自动化、应用签名以及iOS和Web平台的部署流程。

name: capacitor-deep-linking
author: cap-go
description: Complete guide to implementing deep links and universal links in Capacitor apps. Covers iOS Universal Links, Android App Links, custom URL schemes, and navigation handling. Use this skill when users need to open their app from links.
description_zh: 一个关于在 Capacitor 应用中实现深度链接的完整指南，涵盖自定义 URL 方案、iOS 通用链接、Android 应用链接以及从外部链接打开应用时的导航处理。

name: capacitor-keyboard
author: cap-go
description: Guide to handling keyboard in Capacitor apps including visibility detection, accessory bar, scroll behavior, and input focus. Use this skill when users have keyboard-related issues.
description_zh: 该技能提供在Capacitor移动应用中处理键盘行为的指导，包括iOS和Android平台的键盘可见性检测、辅助工具栏、滚动管理和输入焦点控制。

name: capacitor-mcp
author: cap-go
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools for Capacitor mobile development. Covers Ionic/Capacitor component APIs, plugin documentation, CLI commands, and AI-assisted development via MCP. Use this skill when users want to integrate AI agents with Ionic/Capacitor tooling.
description_zh: 该技能提供用于自动化 Capacitor 移动开发任务的 MCP 工具，包括设备管理、应用部署、日志流和自动化测试，以将 AI 代理与移动工具集成。
_original_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools for Capacitor mobile development. Covers device management, app deployment, log streaming, and automated testing via MCP. Use this skill when users want to automate mobile development tasks or integrate AI agents with mobile tooling.

name: capacitor-offline-first
author: cap-go
description: Guide to building offline-first Capacitor apps with data synchronization, caching strategies, and conflict resolution. Covers SQLite, service workers, and network detection. Use this skill when users need their app to work without internet.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用Capacitor构建离线优先移动应用的指南。涵盖网络检测、SQLite本地数据库设置、数据同步策略和缓存技术，确保应用在无网络时正常运行。

name: capacitor-performance
author: cap-go
description: Performance optimization guide for Capacitor apps covering bundle size, rendering, memory, native bridge, and profiling. Use this skill when users need to optimize their app performance.
description_zh: 一个全面的 Capacitor 应用性能优化指南，涵盖包大小缩减、渲染改进、内存管理、原生桥接效率和性能分析技术，帮助构建更快、更响应的应用程序。

name: capacitor-plugins
author: cap-go
description: Complete catalog of 80+ Capgo Capacitor plugins. Use this skill when users need to add native functionality to their Capacitor apps, want to know which plugin solves a specific problem, or need help choosing between plugin options.
description_zh: 该技能提供超过80个Capgo Capacitor插件的完整目录，用于为混合应用添加摄像头、生物识别、支付和实时更新等原生移动功能。

name: capacitor-push-notifications
author: cap-go
description: Complete guide to implementing push notifications in Capacitor apps using Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) and Apple Push Notification Service (APNs). Covers setup, handling, and best practices. Use this skill when users need to add push notifications.
description_zh: 关于在 Capacitor 移动应用中使用 Firebase 云消息传递 (FCM) 和苹果推送通知服务 (APNs) 实现推送通知的完整指南，涵盖设置、配置和最佳实践。

name: capacitor-security
author: cap-go
description: Comprehensive security guide for Capacitor apps using Capsec scanner. Covers 63+ security rules across secrets, storage, network, authentication, cryptography, and platform-specific vulnerabilities. Use this skill when users need to secure their mobile app or run security audits.
description_zh: 一款用于Capacitor和Ionic移动应用的安全扫描工具，可检测密钥、存储、网络和平台特定漏洞。提供自动化扫描、详细报告和修复指导。

name: capacitor-splash-screen
author: cap-go
description: Guide to configuring splash screens in Capacitor apps including asset generation, animation, and programmatic control. Use this skill when users need to customize their app launch experience.
description_zh: 该技能提供在 Capacitor 移动应用中配置和自定义启动屏幕的全面指南，涵盖资源生成、动画设置以及针对 iOS 和 Android 平台的程序化控制。

name: capacitor-testing
author: cap-go
description: Complete testing guide for Capacitor apps covering unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, and native testing. Includes Jest, Vitest, Playwright, Appium, and native testing frameworks. Use this skill when users need to test their mobile apps.
description_zh: 一个全面的 Capacitor 移动应用测试指南，涵盖使用 Jest/Vitest 的单元测试、集成测试、使用 Playwright/Appium 的端到端测试以及原生插件模拟。包含设置说明、代码示例和 CI 集成策略。

name: capgo-live-updates
author: cap-go
description: Complete guide to implementing live updates in Capacitor apps using Capgo. Covers account creation, plugin installation, configuration, update strategies, and CI/CD integration. Use this skill when users want to deploy updates without app store review.
description_zh: 使用Capgo为Capacitor应用实现实时更新的完整指南，支持无需应用商店审核即可即时部署Web内容更新。涵盖设置、配置和CI/CD集成。
